research_question: 将 holding_cohort_count 从 5 改为 10，是否能将 turnover floor 从 0.324 压缩到 ~0.20-0.25 的可达区间？同时保持 invested_weight 不崩溃（>= 0.30）？
change_detail: 唯一变化：holding_cohort_count 5 → 10（cohort_capital_fraction 从 1/5 变为 1/10）。不改变：score family、TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、refresh rule(保留 full refresh)、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard。
contract_matched_reference: exploratory_cohort10_c1_trendbias_only (本轮新建 — 10-cohort, same signal, full refresh)

layer_A_contract_feasibility.description: 验证 10-cohort 是否将 turnover 压到可达区间且 inv_wt 不崩溃

layer_B_strategy_viability.description: 完整 8 道 strategy gates。原 9 道中仅 turnover gate 替换为 ≤ 0.25。

notes: Contract-feasibility round. Tests whether holding_cohort_count=10 alone reduces turnover to target range. If yes, subsequent round may add retention on 10-cohort baseline. Formal comparison baseline: exploratory_cohort5_c1_trendbias_only (5-cohort). Contract-matched reference: exploratory_cohort10_c1_trendbias_only (to be built this round).
